steps: CW structure: one 0-cell $v$ and one $n$-cell $e^n$ attached by the constant map. No cells in dimensions $1, \ldots, n-1$.
Cellular chain complex: all $C_k = 0$ except $C_0 = \mathbb{Z}$ and $C_n = \mathbb{Z}$.
Boundary map $d_n: C_n \to C_{n-1}$. When $n \geq 2$, $C_{n-1} = 0$, so $d_n = 0$.
For $n = 1$: the unique 1-cell is a loop so $d_1 = 0$, recovering $H_0 = H_1 = \mathbb{Z}$.
